case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. THELMA CANTILLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-15-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-15-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
